mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD ( keyword_text, keyword_sound, keyword_detail, tts_text, tts_pronounce, time_duration_ms, file_org_nm, file_new_nm, file_size_bytes, TC_USER_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{keyword}, #{speech}, #{detail}, #{keywordText}, #{pronounceText}, #{timeDurationStr}, #{orgnm}, #{newnm}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{tcUserSeq} )
mapper.select: select SEQ as seq , tts_seq as ttsSeq , keyword_text as keywordText , keyword_sound as keywordSound , tts_text as ttsText , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , TC_USER_SEQ as tcUserSeq , file_new_nm as newnm , status from TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD where SEQ = #{seq}
SELECT SEQ AS seq ,keyword_text AS keywordText ,tts_text AS ttsText ,file_new_nm AS newnm FROM TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD WHERE tts_seq = #{seq}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CS_TTS
trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
trashed_at = NULL
deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE seq = #{seq}

UPDATE TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD
trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
trashed_at = NULL
deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE SEQ in
#{item}
